# setMirroring(_:)

**Instance Method**

Controls whether the receiver enables video mirroring during snapshots.

## Declaration

```swift
func setMirroring(_ b: Bool)
```

## Parameters

- **b**: The default setting is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true].

## Getting and Setting Mirroring

- **mirroring()**: Returns whether video mirroring is enabled during snapshots.
